case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JOSE BARRIOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, JOSE DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-29-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-02-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-06-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64518514) AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, JOSE
DECLARATION RE: INABILITY OF PLAINTIFF TO FILE ACTION IN SMALL CLAIM COURT: PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 64518514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) AND EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 64518514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64518514) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64386518), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-13-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-14-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, JOSE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 64518514) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRIOS, JOSE $2,968.18 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,268.18, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-29-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
